InspirationDef.label: inspired authorship
InspirationDef.beginLetter:
[PAWN_pronoun] will create a manuscript and begin working on it for the duration of the inspiration. Once the inspiration ends, the manuscript will be finalized into a completed book.

The quality of the finished book depends on the time spent writing it. [PAWN_nameDef] will spend [PAWN_possessive] spare time working on the book. Scheduling less "Work" time in the schedule tab will give [PAWN_objective] more time to write, increasing the resulting quality.

If the manuscript is destroyed before it can be completed, then the inspiration will end and the work will be lost.
